heading: Java Users
body:
Let's Encrypt's ISRG root certificate and Google Trust Services root
certificates are both available in the default trust store of [Java
version 7 after the 7u391 update](https://www.oracle.com/java/technologies/javase/7-support-relnotes.html#JDK-8307134)
and [Java version 8 after the 8u381 update](https://www.oracle.com/java/technologies/javase/8u381-relnotes.html#JDK-8307134).
Use a Java release after 18 July 2023.

Ensure your Java client software is up-to-date. Use the latest Java
versions to utilize many improvements beyond these new Certificate Authority
requirements for our TLS (Transport Layer Security) certificates.

If you have your own trust store, add the Let's Encrypt and Google Trust
Services certificates to it. To learn more, see
[FAQ: Security](faq-tls-ca)
